title: Goldfish Size
description: What factors influence the growth rate and maximum size of goldfish?
narrative: A user wants to understand what determines how large a goldfish can grow, including environmental factors such as tank size and water quality, as well as genetic variations among different breeds. Relevant documents should discuss the relationship between fish size and aquarium capacity, feeding habits, and breeding practices.

title: Bluetooth vs WiFi
description: What are the differences between Bluetooth and WiFi technology in terms of range, device connectivity, and performance?
narrative: The user is looking for information that compares and contrasts Bluetooth and WiFi wireless communication standards. Relevant documents should discuss the advantages and disadvantages of each technology, including their respective ranges, device connectivity capabilities, data transfer speeds, and power consumption. Documents that provide technical specifications, benchmarks, or real-world examples illustrating the differences between Bluetooth and WiFi are particularly relevant.

title: US Entry into WWI
description: What were the main reasons behind the United States' decision to enter World War I?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the key events, motivations, and factors that led to the United States' declaration of war on Germany in 1917. Relevant documents should discuss the Zimmerman Note, the sinking of the Lusitania, submarine attacks on passenger ships, and other relevant incidents or policies that contributed to the US entry into WWI.

title: Declaratory Judgment
description: What are the key characteristics and purposes of a declaratory judgment?
narrative: The user is seeking information about declaratory judgments, specifically their definition, purpose, and when they are typically used. Relevant documents should explain the role of declaratory judgments in determining individual rights, the procedure for obtaining one, and any notable considerations or limitations. Documents that provide clear definitions, explanations of the legal context, and examples of when declaratory judgments are appropriate will be considered most relevant.

title: Right Abdominal Pain
description: What are the possible causes of pain in the right lower abdominal area?
narrative: The user is experiencing pain in their right lower abdomen and wants to know the potential underlying causes. Relevant documents should discuss specific conditions or disorders that can cause this type of pain, such as kidney stones, liver issues, or musculoskeletal problems. Documents that provide a general overview of abdominal pain without addressing the right lower quadrant specifically are not relevant.

title: Social Determinants of Health
description: What are the social determinants that affect health status and how can they be addressed through health promotion and disease prevention programs?
narrative: A relevant document should discuss the specific social, economic, cultural, and political conditions that influence modifiable risk behaviors and impact health outcomes. The user is looking for information on how these determinants can be targeted by health promotion and disease prevention programs to promote good health for all.

title: Legionnaires Disease
description: What are the risks and consequences of Legionnaires disease, particularly in relation to environmental exposure and property management?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the causes, symptoms, and prevention of Legionnaires disease, with a focus on how it can be contracted through environmental exposure, such as contaminated water systems. Relevant documents should discuss the risks associated with Legionnaires disease, particularly in the context of property management and rental properties. The user is also interested in learning about the legal requirements for managing these risks and any potential consequences of failing to do so.

title: Best Time to Visit Jamaica
description: What is the best time of year to visit Jamaica in terms of weather and climate?
narrative: A tourist planning a trip to Jamaica wants to know the optimal time to visit the island based on weather conditions, including temperature and precipitation. Relevant documents should provide information about the average temperatures, rainfall, and hurricane risk during different months or seasons. Documents that highlight the pros and cons of visiting during specific times of the year will be considered most relevant.

title: Dysarthria Causes
description: What are the underlying causes and characteristics of dysarthria?
narrative: A user with a loved one suffering from slurred speech wants to understand the possible reasons behind this condition. Relevant documents should explain the various underlying causes of dysarthria, such as nerve damage, brain disorders, or muscle weakness, as well as its characteristic symptoms and effects on speech.

title: Robert Gray Expedition
description: What were the key events and geographical discoveries of Captain Robert Gray's expedition to the Pacific Northwest in 1792?
narrative: The user is looking for information about Captain Robert Gray's voyage to the Pacific Northwest in 1792, specifically his exploration of the Columbia River and surrounding areas. Relevant documents should describe the route taken by Gray, notable landmarks and features he discovered, and any significant events that occurred during the expedition.

title: Sous Vide Cooking Times
description: What are the optimal cooking times and temperatures for various foods using sous vide methods?
narrative: A user wants to know the best practices for cooking different types of food, such as eggs, ribs, steak, and fish, using a sous vide machine. Relevant documents should provide specific guidance on cooking times and temperatures to achieve tender and properly cooked results. The user is looking for detailed information on how to use sous vide methods to cook various foods to the right level of doneness.

title: Flea Survival
description: How long can fleas survive without a host?
narrative: The user wants to know the duration for which fleas can live without a host, considering various environmental conditions and stages of their life cycle. Relevant documents should provide information on the average lifespan of adult fleas, eggs, and larvae in the absence of a host, as well as factors that influence their survival.

title: Contour Plowing Benefits
description: What are the advantages of using contour plowing techniques in farming?
narrative: A farmer wants to know how contour plowing can help reduce soil erosion and preserve topsoil. Relevant documents should explain the benefits of contour plowing, such as its ability to slow water flow and create ridges that prevent rapid runoff. Documents that provide information on the history of contour plowing or its implementation are also relevant if they discuss its advantages.

title: Salvation Army Founder
description: Who was the founder of The Salvation Army and what were his key contributions to the organization's development?
narrative: The user is looking for information about the person who founded The Salvation Army, specifically their background, role in shaping the organization, and notable achievements. Relevant documents should provide biographical details about the founder, such as their name, dates of birth and death, and significant events or decisions that impacted the organization's growth.

title: Active Continental Margins
description: What are the characteristics and geological processes associated with active continental margins?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the formation, features, and behaviors of active continental margins, including the role of plate tectonics, subduction, earthquakes, and volcanic activity. Relevant documents should describe the differences between active and passive continental margins, and provide examples or case studies of active margins around the world.

title: RN to BSN Career Benefits
description: What are the career benefits of pursuing a BSN degree after becoming an RN?
narrative: A registered nurse considering further education wants to know how obtaining a BSN degree will impact their job prospects, career advancement opportunities, and overall professional growth. Relevant documents should discuss the advantages of having a BSN degree in terms of employability, marketability, and access to various clinical and non-hospital job positions.

title: CPAP Effectiveness
description: What are the benefits and effectiveness of using Continuous Positive Airway Pressure (CPAP) treatment for sleep disorders?
narrative: The user is seeking information on the efficacy of CPAP treatment, including its ability to improve breathing and overall quality of sleep. Relevant documents should discuss the benefits and drawbacks of CPAP, as well as any scientific evidence supporting its use. Documents that provide personal anecdotes or testimonials are not relevant.

title: Trapezoid Midsegment
description: What is the relationship between the midsegment and the bases of a trapezoid?
narrative: The user is seeking to understand how the midsegment of a trapezoid relates to its bases, specifically how the length of the midsegment can be calculated using the lengths of the bases. Relevant documents should provide a clear explanation of this relationship and possibly offer examples or formulas for calculating the midsegment.

title: AML Analyst Roles
description: What are the responsibilities and requirements of anti-money laundering analyst positions?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the job duties, skills, and experience required for analysts working in anti-money laundering (AML) roles. Relevant documents should describe the specific tasks, qualifications, and expectations for AML analysts, as well as any relevant laws or regulations governing their work.

title: Thai Baht Information
description: What are the current exchange options and cultural significance of Thai Baht?
narrative: A traveler to Thailand wants to know about the current status and usage of Thai Baht, including its acceptance in neighboring countries, methods for exchanging it, and any cultural or historical context relevant to understanding its importance. Relevant documents should provide information on the validity and exchangeability of Thai Baht, as well as its role in Thai culture and traditions.

title: Tornado Forecast Reliability
description: What are the key factors and models used to forecast tornadoes, and how reliable are these forecasts?
narrative: A user wants to understand the methodology behind predicting tornadoes, including the role of meteorologists' experience, weather observations, and forecast models. Relevant documents should discuss the accuracy and limitations of current forecasting systems, as well as any additional factors that contribute to the reliability of tornado forecasts.

title: Polished Concrete Flooring Costs
description: What are the typical costs associated with installing polished concrete flooring?
narrative: A user is planning to install polished concrete flooring and wants to know the estimated costs for different levels of grinding, decorative scoring, staining, and finishing. Relevant documents should provide detailed cost estimates per square foot for various types of polished concrete floors, including basic, premium, and luxury grades.

title: Swiss Regional Cuisine
description: What are some traditional Swiss dishes and their regional variations?
narrative: The user is interested in learning about the diverse culinary traditions within Switzerland, including regional specialties and local ingredients. Relevant results should describe specific Swiss dishes, their origins, and variations across different regions of Switzerland.

title: Shark Thermoregulation
description: What are the advantages and disadvantages of endothermy in sharks, and how do they impact their behavior and ecosystems?
narrative: The user is looking for information on how some shark species, such as the Mako and Great White Shark, are able to regulate their body temperature, and what benefits and drawbacks this ability brings. Relevant documents should discuss the physiological mechanisms of endothermy in sharks, its effects on their hunting behavior and energy needs, and its implications for marine ecosystems. Documents that simply list shark species or provide general information about sharks without addressing thermoregulation are not relevant.

title: Durable Medical Equipment Coverage
description: What types of durable medical equipment are covered by Medicare and Medicaid, and what are the requirements for coverage?
narrative: A person with a chronic medical condition is seeking information about the types of durable medical equipment (DME) that are covered by Medicare and Medicaid. They want to know what specific items are included in DME coverage, such as oxygen equipment, wheelchairs, and blood testing strips. They also need to understand the requirements for coverage, including whether a doctor's prescription is necessary and what criteria must be met for equipment to be considered durable and medically necessary. Relevant documents should provide clear information about DME coverage policies and procedures.

title: Exon-Intron Function
description: What are the roles of exons and introns in gene transcription and translation?
narrative: A user seeking to understand the molecular genetics of eukaryotic genes wants to know how exons and introns function during transcription and translation. Relevant documents should explain the definitions and technical distinctions between exons, introns, and codons, as well as describe the processes of RNA splicing and gene fusion. Documents that merely mention these terms without providing clear explanations or descriptions of their functions are not relevant.

title: Gut Instinct
description: What does it mean to trust one's gut instinct, and how does it relate to emotions and decision-making?
narrative: The user is seeking information on the concept of trusting one's gut instinct, including its relationship to emotional responses, personal courage, and decision-making. Relevant documents should provide explanations or examples of how people use their intuition or instincts to make choices or navigate situations, as well as discussions of the role of emotions and rational thinking in this process.

title: Xylem Function
description: What are the primary functions of xylem tissue in vascular plants?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the main roles of xylem tissue in vascular plants, including its involvement in water and nutrient transport, structural support, and other related functions. Relevant documents should provide a clear explanation of xylem's primary functions and may include details on its composition, cell types, and interactions with other plant tissues.

title: RSA Encryption
description: How does RSA encryption work and what are its key components?
narrative: The user is looking for information on how RSA encryption functions, including the role of public and private keys, and how it compares to other encryption methods in terms of security. Relevant documents should explain the basics of RSA encryption, its uses, and its advantages over symmetric encryption.

title: CIS Visa Policies
description: What are the visa policies for citizens of Commonwealth of Independent States countries traveling to Russia?
narrative: A user wants to know the specific visa requirements and regulations for citizens of CIS countries when visiting Russia, including any duration limits or work restrictions. Relevant documents should provide clear information on these policies, ideally with a list of specific countries and their corresponding regulations.

title: Ventricular Hypertrophy Causes
description: What are the causes and effects of ventricular hypertrophy, particularly left ventricular hypertrophy?
narrative: A user wants to understand the underlying reasons for ventricular hypertrophy, including its association with high blood pressure, heart valve problems, and other conditions. Relevant documents should explain the different types of ventricular hypertrophy, their causes, and how they impact cardiac health. Documents that provide a clear explanation of the relationship between ventricular hypertrophy and cardiovascular complications are most relevant.

title: Involuntary Mental Health Treatment
description: What are the laws and procedures surrounding involuntary mental health treatment in Florida, particularly with regards to The Baker Act?
narrative: A social worker is looking for information on the specifics of Florida's mental illness treatment law, known as The Baker Act. They want to know the criteria for court-ordered outpatient treatment, the process for voluntary and involuntary admissions, and the time limits for holding a person under the act. Relevant documents should provide details on the law's provisions, including any changes or reforms that have been made.

title: Three Percenter Movement
description: What are the core principles and characteristics of the Three Percenter movement?
narrative: A relevant document should provide insight into the ideology, goals, and values of the Three Percenter movement, including its relationship to anti-government extremism and the Oath Keepers. Relevant documents may include definitions of what it means to be a Three Percenter, descriptions of the movement's organizational structure, or examples of the group's activities and rhetoric.

title: Veteran Suicide Prevention
description: What are the causes and risk factors of suicide among veterans, and what interventions or strategies have been shown to be effective in preventing veteran suicides?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the complex issue of veteran suicide prevention. Relevant documents should discuss the underlying causes of suicidal behavior among veterans, such as PTSD, depression, and substance abuse, as well as any evidence-based interventions or strategies that have been shown to reduce the risk of suicide among this population. Documents may also include statistics on veteran suicide rates, research findings on effective treatments, and information on crisis hotlines and other support services.

title: Theraderm Effectiveness
description: Is the Theraderm Skin Renewal System effective in reducing fine lines, rough skin, and sun damage?
narrative: A user is considering purchasing the Theraderm Skin Renewal System but has seen mixed reviews online. They want to know if the system truly delivers on its promises of producing younger-looking skin. Relevant documents should provide evidence-based information on the system's effectiveness, including any clinical trials or studies that support its claims. Documents that simply promote the product without providing credible evidence are not relevant.

title: Herpes Treatment Options
description: What are the most effective treatment options for managing herpes symptoms?
narrative: A user has been diagnosed with herpes and wants to know about the different medications available to manage their symptoms. They are looking for information on the effectiveness of various antiviral drugs, such as Acyclovir, Famciclovir, and Valacyclovir, in reducing the severity and frequency of outbreaks. Relevant documents should discuss the pros and cons of each treatment option, including their efficacy, potential side effects, and dosing regimens.

title: Ecological Anthropology
description: What are the key concepts and principles of ecological anthropology, including its relationship to human ecology and environmental adaptations?
narrative: The user is seeking information on the sub-field of ecological anthropology, specifically its focus on cultural adaptations to environments and the interactions between humans, culture, and biology in shaping environmental relationships. Relevant documents should provide definitions, explanations, and examples of ecological anthropology's core concepts, as well as its connections to related fields such as human ecology and paleoanthropology.

title: Neural Signal Transmission
description: How do neurons transmit signals to each other?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the process by which neurons communicate with each other, specifically how signals are transmitted from one neuron to another through synapses. Relevant documents should describe the structure and function of synapses, including the role of neurotransmitters and the mechanisms by which they facilitate signal transmission.

title: Paris Airport Transfers
description: What are the options for transferring from Charles de Gaulle or Orly airports to central Paris?
narrative: A traveler arriving at one of Paris' international airports needs to know their options for getting to central Paris. Relevant documents should describe the various transfer methods available, such as trains, and provide information on travel times, costs, and any notable features or considerations.

title: Monotonic Sequence Properties
description: What are the characteristics of a monotonic sequence or function?
narrative: A user is looking for information on sequences and functions that are either increasing, decreasing, or have some other monotonic property. Relevant documents should define these terms, provide examples, and explain how to determine if a sequence or function has these properties. The user may also be interested in the implications of these properties, such as how they affect the graph of a function.

title: Fast Growing Spruces
description: What are the species of spruce trees known for their exceptionally fast growth rates?
narrative: The user is looking for information about spruce tree species that have faster than average growth rates. Relevant documents should identify specific species of spruce trees, such as Sitka spruce or Colorado blue spruce, and provide information about their growth rates. Documents that only discuss the general characteristics of spruce trees or list species without mentioning growth rates are not relevant.

title: Liquid Hydrogen Properties
description: What are the physical properties and uses of liquid hydrogen?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the characteristics of liquid hydrogen, such as its boiling point, storage conditions, and applications. Relevant documents should provide details on the physical properties of liquid hydrogen, including its temperature range, pressure requirements, and uses in industries like rocket fuel or energy production.

title: McDouble vs Double Cheeseburger
description: What are the similarities and differences between McDonald's McDouble and Double Cheeseburger menu items?
narrative: A user is trying to decide whether to purchase a McDouble or a Double Cheeseburger from McDonald's, considering factors such as price, nutritional content, and value for money. Relevant documents should provide information on the comparisons between these two menu items, including their ingredients, prices, and nutritional values.
